description: Not all buttons are treated the same — some are contained to a certain size while others spread to fill their container. All buttons should be contained/constrained to a consistent max-width rather than stretching. Audit all button usages across pages and ensure they use consistent sizing. File: src/components/ui/button.tsx and button usages across section components. No overlap with Navbar or Footer files — safe to run in parallel.
title: Button containment: consistent sizing, no spreading
